top_papers.title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
top_papers.why_it_matters: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery advances our understanding of large language models, which are reshaping how we build AI systems and interact with knowledge.
